_note: The `ai` category is dominated by embedder/knowledge/model/runtime DTOs; the authorable metadata types are Agent, Tool, Skill (allowlist). Seeded from docs/audits/2026-06-{agent,tool,skill}schema-property-liveness.md (file:line evidence). Framework provenance/lock fields (_lock*, _provenance, _packageId, protection) are auto-classified by the gate (ADR-0010).

Agent._note: agent-runtime.ts is the runtime consumer; AgentPreview is display-only (not a runtime reader).

role.note: persona → system prompt; also derives chatbot picker description.

model.note: PARTIAL — model/temperature/maxTokens applied; model.provider + model.topP are DEAD (provider comes from the configured adapter).

planning.note: PARTIAL — only planning.maxIterations is live (3 call sites); planning.strategy/allowReplan are DEAD.

access.note: 'who can chat' is a no-op — the chat route hardcodes ['ai:chat','ai:agents'] regardless. Latent access-control gap (ADR-0049 #1884: enforce or remove).

knowledge.evidence: no runtime reader; AgentPreview.tsx:213 reads knowledge.sources but spec defines {topics,indexes}
knowledge.note: shape drift; RAG is wired via service-knowledge, not agent.knowledge.

lifecycle.note: aspirational autonomy — prune or keep as roadmap (ADR-0049 enforce-or-remove).

guardrails.note: aspirational — real limits enforced by an unrelated quota service, not these.

Tool._note: Tool metadata is WRITE-ONLY — projected one-way from the code-built ToolRegistry into metadata for Studio display (plugin.ts:813). No code reads `tool` metadata back; the runtime contract is a separate AIToolDefinition. The LIVE props are live via that same-named AIToolDefinition surface, not via metadata read-back.

outputSchema.note: docstring claims output validation + chaining, but no validation exists.

category.evidence: listing/preview tag only; enum drift vs AIToolDefinition free-string

requiresConfirmation.note: never read off the def — redundant mirror.

permissions.evidence: tool.form.ts only; not on AIToolDefinition, no consumer

active.evidence: never set by any registration path

builtIn.evidence: never set by any registration path

Skill._note: skill-registry.ts + agent-runtime.ts are the runtime consumers.

label.note: injected into the agent system prompt.

tools.note: tool-contribution path incl. action_* wildcard expand.

triggerPhrases.evidence: no intent/phrase matcher; only populates the slash-command palette summary (toSummary)
triggerPhrases.note: schema frames them as activating the skill, but nothing matches user text — intent routing unimplemented.

permissions.evidence: no code restricts a skill by skill.permissions; naming drift (preview calls it requiredPermissions)
